projects.name: Resolvit AI
projects.description: AI-powered civic issue tracking system with real-time priority scoring, blockchain audit trails, and authority performance accountability. Uses FastAPI for backend, vanilla JS/Leaflet for frontend, and PostgreSQL for storage.

projects.name: Prometheus AI V2.0
projects.description: A local-first, privacy-centric Gen-AI system utilizing Llama 3.2 and Apple MLX for secure, voice-enabled intelligence.

projects.name: BenchAI / Student Bench AI
projects.description: Offline LLM + RAG-powered smart classroom infrastructure providing multilingual AI learning support without internet dependency.

projects.name: Python GUI Utility
projects.description: Desktop application using Tkinter/PyQt with robust backend processing, reducing processing latency by 12% vs CLI tools.
